title: Be Alert [Archived]
description: Be alert to your surroundings. Someone might be watching you, and someone might be trying to kill you while you aren't looking behind you
body:
## **This modpack is still experimental** **Still working on optimizing performance.**
# Introduction ### Are you tired of playing Minecraft peacefully? Then this modpack will make your game experience much more thrilling! # Installation #### You can use [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app) or read [documentation](https://support.modrinth.com/en/articles/8802250-modpacks-on-modrinth) about modpack installation in other launchers ## Caution #### This modpack may include jump scares and loud effects.
Do not open Be alert at your surrounding, and pay more attention

Anyway, have fun playing it on a server or in singleplayer.


I tried to play it, but I ended up dying a lot and failing.
## Additional Support me on: - [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/nakirium) - [Buy me a coffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/nakirium)
